## Angle Brackets

This document contains <placeholder text> that should be escaped.
Also <multiple words here> should be escaped.

But <p>this is HTML</p> and should not be escaped.

## Code Blocks

```python
# This <code> should not be escaped
x = "<value>"
```

Inline code like `<var>` should not be escaped either.
